title: VCP Policy Decision Response
description: Policy Authority -> Gateway. On `deny`, the response MUST carry a structured, machine-actionable reason_code and SHOULD carry remediation so a Planner can self-correct (the mcp-ledger LEDGER_LIMIT_EXCEEDED pattern). See SPECIFICATION.md §6.

decision.description: challenge = request additional consent / step-up before re-deciding.

constraints.description: Bounds the Gateway MUST encode into the minted grant.

obligations.description: Side obligations the Gateway MUST fulfill, e.g. audit, notify, log-to-ledger.

reason_code.description: Machine-actionable code. On deny, REQUIRED. Stable, screaming-snake-case, e.g. ALLOWED_WITH_CONSTRAINTS, DATA_FLOW_FORBIDDEN, BUDGET_EXCEEDED, MANIFEST_UNVERIFIED, APPROVAL_REQUIRED.

remediation.description: On deny, SHOULD describe what would make the call allowable (drop a data flow, narrow scope, obtain consent).
